experiments.label: baseline
experiments.comment: Reference MLX fast-dev baseline for comparison.

experiments.label: obviously_worse_tiny_model
experiments.comment: Much smaller model. This should be clearly worse on 50-step train loss if the harness is behaving sensibly.

experiments.label: obviously_worse_high_embed_lr
experiments.comment: Aggressively high tied-embedding LR. Intended to worsen early optimization and prove the harness reacts to bad settings.

experiments.label: likely_better_wider_model
experiments.comment: Wider model with the same depth. Not guaranteed, but this is a more substantial capacity increase and should move train loss more than subtle one-knob changes.

experiments.label: likely_better_wider_mlp3
experiments.comment: Wider model plus larger MLP. Again not guaranteed, but this is the kind of change that is more likely to show a clear train-loss effect on a tiny proxy.
